programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pinewood Derby: Randy and Stan somehow discover warp speed, allowing Earth to join the Galactic Federation of Planets, but will an alien gangster and his 'space cash' ruin everything? (S13, E06)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Fatbeard: Cartman hears of all the riches being plundered by the pirates in Somalia, so dons his eye patch and leads a motley crew off to Africa to get in on the act. (S13, E07)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Dead Celebrities: The ghost of Michael Jackson refuses to accept his death, leaving the rest of the recently dead celebrities frustrated in purgatory and poor Ike having ghostly visits! (S13, E08)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Butter's Bottom B***h: Oblivious to his actions, the little innocent Butters starts up 'The Kissing Company', and is soon the most notorious pimp around. Will undercover cops ruin his fun? (S13, E09)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: W. T. F.: After seeing their first live WWE wrestling match the boys decide to form their own wrestling federation... and gain a huge redneck following! (S13, E10)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Whale W****s: Kyle joins the crew of a reality documentary show who confront Japanese whalers, but finds their tactics leave a lot to be desired for and that war with Japan beckons! (S13, E11)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The F Word: The boys confront a group of obnoxious bikers, but their methods force the townsfolk to redefine the meaning of a rather offensive word. Time to update the English Dictionary! (S13, E12)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Dances With Smurfs: Cartman's vitriol finally gets a platform when he is chosen to be the school's morning announcer, and he unashamedly abuses his position. Power corrupts... (S13, E13)

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Pee: High levels of pee in the pool cause a disaster which ruins the day for the boys, Kyle especially. Eric's xenophobia pops up again when he believes himself "the last of his species". (S13, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Weight Gain 4000
programme.desc: Weight Gain 4000: Cartman wins a school essay competition by cheating and decides to buff up before receiving his award from Kathy Lee Gifford. Mr. Garrison and Mr. Hat plot to kill her! (S1, E02)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman Gets an Anal Probe
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Volcano
programme.desc: Volcano: The boys go on a hunting trip with Stan's Uncle Jimbo to find the famous Scuzzlebutt. They are unaware that the mountain they are hunting on is a volcano on the verge of erupting! (S1, E03)

programme.title: South Park: An Elephant Makes Love to a Pig
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)
programme.sub-title: An Elephant Makes Love to a Pig

programme.title: South Park: Death
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park: Pink Eye
programme.desc: Pink Eye: It's Halloween and Kenny is killed by a falling space station and turned into a zombie by some embalming fluid contaminated with Worcester sauce. The zombie disease spreads. (S1, E07)

programme.title: South Park: Damien
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Starvin' Marvin
programme.desc: Starvin' Marvin: During a Terrance & Phillip ad-break the boys decide to adopt an Ethiopian child, swayed by the promise of a free digital watch. Mobs of wild turkeys rampage through town! (S1, E08)

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Hankey the Christmas Poo
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.desc: CHANNEL STARTS AT 9PM Follow everyone's favorite troublemakers—Stan, Kyle, Cartman, and Kenny--from the very beginning of their unforgettable adventures.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The huge axe of Robot Thor driven by Jason, a builder from Northampton, clashes with father-and-son team Will and Ian from Team Shockwave. A consultant cardiologist and his two sons cause a huge upset with their brand new untested robot.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: An eclectic collection of homemade robots including Glitterbomb, designed by nine-year-old April, which comes complete with a huge pink axe. A team of students from Falkirk bring a robot made of wood with a petrol engine.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Former holiday camp bluecoats enter the competition with their `launcher' Apollo. Father and-son-team Kan-Opener have a robot with huge piercing claws. A team of engineering students have created a future tech machine called Sweeney Todd.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Featuring one of the most bizarre, but certainly the tallest robot ever seen on `Robot Wars', Gabriel, built by Mensa member Craig and his three sons. It has wheels as tall as a washing machine and a huge samurai sword.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Winner robots from rounds one through five battle it out in the arena, a wild card from the runners up throws a spanner in the works as it tries to overthrow attempts at glory.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: A new spinner has something to prove and a family team pour blood, sweat and tears into keeping their robot wars dream alive. The robots compete through brutal group battles and fierce head to heads for a place in the heat final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The challenge for competitors is even tougher as the infamous House Robots have been let off the leash in a new twist. This is the second heat, and only one of the eight teams can go through to the series grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Four teams progress into a mini league going head to head in a bid for points. The top two teams will face each other in the heat final for the chance to secure their place in this series' grand final.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: This fourth heat is an explosive display of spinners as old favourites take on new hopefuls. They must dodge the arena hazards and the menacing new twist as house robots are unleashed to attack competitors and inflict maximum damage.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: The reigning champions Apollo mount their defence of the title. They face stiff competition from Ms Nightshade, Coyote, Rusty, Crackers'N'Smash, Meggamouse, Trolley Rage and Carbide.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: It is the grand final and the teams must dodge the arena hazards and, in a menacing new twist, they can also hit the Arena Tyre to unleash the dreaded House Robots, allowing them to inflict maximum damage anywhere in the arena.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Learn more about this infamous Robot and the family that built it. With an unforgettable design and devastating weapon, the Hypno-Disc competitor became an instant icon.

programme.title: Robot Wars
programme.desc: Debuting in the Second Wars, to becoming the most successful Robot ever to take part in Robot Wars. The Razer Robot put the squeeze on all the competition, including the House Robots.

programme.title: MechMania
programme.desc: The competition begins with the first heat, with new robots and some familiar faces as teams get a feel for the arena and size up their competition.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandra & Kyle
programme.desc: Sandra and Kyle have been renting her late grandma’s shabby, outdated house and it’s time for something more modern. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Mark & Priscilla
programme.desc: With a second child on the way, Mark and Priscilla are desperate to escape their cramped rental. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated on time.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Christine and Mathieu
programme.desc: Christine, Mathieu and their two active kids are living in a cramped rental and urgently need to escape. The Property Brothers come to the rescue helping them find a budget-friendly dream home that can be renovated.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kathryn and Eric
programme.desc: Expectant parents Kathryn and Eric are ready to trade in his downtown bachelor pad for a family-friendly house in the suburbs. They want a big bright kitchen, formal dining space, cozy living room and a beautiful nursery

programme.title: Property Brothers: Danielle and Chad
programme.desc: Danielle and Chad, and their three rambunctious kids, are sharing a tiny bedroom in his mom’s house. They want a private, detached home with four bedrooms, spacious kitchen, playroom, plus a backyard

programme.title: Property Brothers: Joey and Mark
programme.desc: Joey and Mark and their baby daughter are desperate to escape their tiny downtown basement for peace and quiet in the country. They want a big master bedroom, modern kitchen and bathroom, plus ample stable space.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Kari and Boris
programme.desc: Avid video gamers Boris and Kari are expecting a baby so it’s time for better digs. But with their tiny condo already rented out, time is ticking. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Stephane and Karina
programme.desc: Stephan and Karina have moved 12 times in 15 years and their kids, Samuel and Alicia, have had enough! Tired of renting and renovations, the doting parents promise to set down roots in a super-stylish modern home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Christa and Sumit
programme.desc: Christa and Sumit have reached their limit and want to flee from their cramped townhouse into a large free-flowing home with all the modern fixings. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly dream home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Nancy and Rhonda
programme.desc: Nancy and Rhonda are both eager to move away from cramped city living into a serene and stylish home, but the power couple needs tons of space to make it work. The Property Brothers help them find a budget-friendly space

programme.title: Property Brothers: Veronica and Andrew
programme.desc: Veronica and Andrew have had it with their cramped condo. With Veronica’s maternity leave coming to an end, the clock is ticking to find the perfect home in which to raise their young family. The Property Brothers help.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Maria & Dave
programme.desc: After six months of hotel living with their dog and two sons, Maria and stay-at-home dad Dave are feeling the squeeze. Fed up with their cramped quarters, they’re finally ready to find a sprawling suburban home.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Franklin & Heather
programme.desc: Tired of living in their cramped condo, Franklin and Heather are hoping to find a sprawling move-in ready home where they can entertain in style. However, their wish list is way out of step with their budget.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Edith & Fred
programme.desc: Edith and Fred have been living with their son, and it’s high time to move on. The couple has big dreams for their next home, and they’re determined to find a resort-style oasis where they can live large and entertain.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Melissa & Joe
programme.desc: With their two small children, Melissa and Joe outgrew the family home, so they sold the property and moved in with her parents. But now they’re even more cramped for space than before.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Sandy & Susy
programme.desc: With an empty nest and a new lease on life, Sandy is looking to live it up in an urban pad of her own. And she’s enlisted her identical twin sister and best friend Susy to help her find the perfect downtown property.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Chris & Mike
programme.desc: After years of sharing a tiny pool house in their parents’ backyard, brothers Chris and Mike have saved up a tidy nest egg and are ready to break out on their own.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Beatriz & Brandon
programme.desc: With busy careers and an active lifestyle, Beatriz and Brandon have outgrown their cramped condo. But they’re ready to give up on their frustrating house hunt too, because after a series of unsuccessful offers.

programme.title: Property Brothers: Luca, Anne & Barbara
programme.desc: Ready to take their relationship to the next level, Anne and Luca are looking for a budget dream home in the city. And while they agree on steering clear of the suburbs, their styles are miles apart.

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Stacy is a paranormal investigator. When a demon attacks her son she asks a colleague for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Legend Trippers
programme.desc: High school classmates test out an old ghost story on Halloween night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dangerous Games
programme.desc: Carl, Keith and Cynthia Johnson begin using a spirit board, to communicate with the spirit haunting their home. But when their sister, Cynthia, is attacked both boys realize they are in over their heads and reach out to a paranormal investigator for help.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Diabolical
programme.desc: A session with a Ouija board transforms Marie’s home into a portal for the diabolical.

programme.title: A Haunting: Portal Of Doom
programme.desc: Anita Intenzo and her son, Chris, encounter the ghost of their recently deceased friend Paul while preparing his house to be sold. Paul warns of a demon attached to an artifact he acquired abroad. The demon invades Anita’s home and all hell breaks loose.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Apartment
programme.desc: The Spencer’s move to a new apartment that is loud with spirits.

programme.title: A Haunting: Back From The Grave
programme.desc: Stay-at-home-mom Jamie enjoys taking walks with her children through her historic North Carolina neighborhood, until "something" dark and sinister follows them home. Jamie soon finds her son directly communicating with an entity from "beyond the grave."

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Rises
programme.desc: After a major surgery forces Jacinda Rearick to recuperate at home, she discovers orbs in family photos. At first, Jacinda believes that they are her deceased parents watching over her. But something much more sinister is invading her home.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Forgotten
programme.desc: A family begins renovating their new house, unaware of a ghostly inhabitant that hates change.

programme.title: A Haunting: Where Demons Dwell
programme.desc: Young David suffers from intense nightmares and is physically attacked by an invisible entity.

programme.title: A Haunting: Grave Awakenings
programme.desc: When ghosts confront Zoe Dei, she makes the harrowing discovery that her home harbors a paranormal portal which has awakened her dormant ability as psychic medium, forcing her to learn how to live with her newfound ability to see the dead.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Presence
programme.desc: Sarah Miller believes that something supernatural in her home is terrorizing her children.

programme.title: A Haunting: Shape Of Evil
programme.desc: Jay Yaple persuades his wife that Enfield, CT, is the perfect place for them. After a series of unexplained events, Jay discovers the house has a dark history of mysterious deaths. Anyone who attempts to come to their aid is driven away by the demon.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hungry Ghosts
programme.desc: In Taiwan, an American family refuses to believe there are ghosts in their house.

programme.title: Celebrity Eggheads
programme.desc: Can a team from world of arts and entertainment featuring actor Simon Greenall, singer Toyah Willcox, arts correspondent Nick Higham, award winning saxophonist YolanDa Brown and Proms presenter Katie Derham win the cash prize for their charity?

programme.title: Eggheads
programme.desc: The Eggheads team are made up of some of Britain's top quizzers. They face a team of challengers trying to beat the incumbents in order to win a cash prize. If the Eggheads beat the challengers, the cash prize is rolled over to subsequent episodes.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Charles Albright is suspected to have brutally murdered three women in Dallas' red light district.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Clues to serial killer doctor Harold Shipman's crimes could be found in his background. After being convicted of the murders of 15 elderly patients, it is believe the true number of victims could be as high as 275.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Childhood friends John Duffy and David Mulcahy murder several women in London.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Bill Suff's murderous reign of terror spanned 6 years and stole the lives of at least 12 women in California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Bill Suff's murderous reign of terror spanned 6 years and stole the lives of at least 12 women in California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Psychologists and experts in the field seek clues as to what prompted the awful crimes carried out by Beverley Allitt.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1984, Wesley Shermantine and Loren Herzog embarked upon a drug-fuelled killing spree that would span 15 years, dumping their victims in the remote rural Californian countryside and down old pioneer wells where they had spent their childhood.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 2002, two gunmen terrorised the American capital with random fatal shootings. A look at if their appetite for murder was innate or learned.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A gripping study of the crimes of the Boston strangler. One of the most famous serial killers in history, he admitted to 13 murders, although many still believe his confession was false.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Gerald and Charlene Gallego join forces to rape and murder several teenagers.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Manchester murderer, Trevor Hardy, took the lives of three teenage girls in the 1970s.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1981, the Yorkshire Ripper murdered 13 females and brutally attacked at least seven more in the north of England. When Peter Sutcliffe was eventually captured, his family were stunned.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The concluding episode in this investigative series profiles Ivan Milat, the murderer of numerous backpackers in Australia in the 1990s. What led him to kill?

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: This edition reviews the case of Levi Bellfield who murdered three women, including Milly Dowler.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Richard Cottingham murdered at least six people and dismembered his victims' bodies.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1999, Carole Sund, her 15-year-old daughter Juli and Juli's friend Silvina Pelosso disappeared from Yosemite National Park, California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: After being convicted of attempted murder and kidnapping, David Carpenter went on to kill five women.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The crimes of Ted Bundy, who is believed to have sexually assaulted and bludgeoned to death up to 100 young women in the USA in the 1970s.

programme.title: Feminine Touch
programme.desc: The public and private lives of five girls, who start out as student nurses in the National Health service during the 1950s.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: Shakespeare's king attacks France in a drama that begins at the old Globe Theatre, becomes a movie and ends back on stage.

programme.title: A Challenge for Robin Hood
programme.desc: Robin and his Merry Men set out to dethrone a self-appointed dictator who has seized power over the commoners.

programme.title: Kidnapped
programme.desc: Robert Louis Stevenson's hero David Balfour joins rebel Alan Breck Stewart in 18th-century Scotland.

programme.title: That Hamilton Woman
programme.desc: The ill-fated romance of Horatio Lord Nelson and Emma Hamilton, wife of the British Ambassador to Naples. Made during WWII, the film was clearly meant to raise the morale of British audiences and was said to have been Churchill's favourite film.

programme.title: The Bad Lord Byron
programme.desc: Seriously ill on a military campaign in Greece, Lord Byron dreams of being judged, upon his death, as either a poet and soldier or as a seducer and libertine. Amongst the witnesses called are his free-thinking mistress and his more conventional wife.

programme.title: Conquest of the Air
programme.desc: Docudrama of man's struggle to achieve mastery over the air.

programme.title: The Magic Box
programme.desc: Biography of British film pioneer William Friese-Greene, who designed and patented a working cinematic camera at the expense of his domestic life. He was largely ignored by the commercial industry until the publication of a controversial biography.

programme.title: Hobson's Choice
programme.desc: A crusty old bootmaker attempts to retain his cheap source of labour by preventing his three daughters from marrying.

programme.title: Medium: You Give Me Fever
programme.desc: Allison's visions become a vital source of information to the authorities after samples of a deadly disease disappear. Meanwhile, Scanlon thinks he's ready to ask Lynn to marry him.

programme.title: Medium: An Everlasting Love
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a serial killer case dies, and the police are convinced he's the guilty party. When the dead suspect contacts Allison, he tells her that he's innocent and agrees to help her find the real killer.

programme.title: Medium: Dear Dad...
programme.desc: As the anniversary of Devalos' daughter's death come to pass, Devalos is haunted by memories of the traumatic event. Meanwhile, Allison has dreams of the extreme measures Devalos went to put his daughter's killer in jail.

programme.title: Medium: Psych
programme.desc: Allison dreams about a schizophrenic child, but when she meets her in real life, she seems perfectly normal -- but has a mentally ill roommate.

programme.title: Medium: Will The Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?
programme.desc: Allison keeps seeing the face of one man in the faces of other people, including Joe, and must figure out why. Meanwhile, Ariel has a difficult time babysitting a mischievous boy.
programme.sub-title: Will The Real Fred Rovick Please Stand Up?

programme.title: Medium: How To Beat A Bad Guy
programme.desc: Allison enrolls herself in self-defense classes. Meanwhile, Devalos works on a teenager's rape case, as well as looking into a suspected murder involving a police officer.
programme.sub-title: How To Beat A Bad Guy

programme.title: Medium: Allison Rolen Got Married
programme.desc: Viewers get a look back at Allison and Joe's wedding, and how the growing strength of Allison's "powers" affected the soon-to-be-married couple.

programme.title: Medium: There Will Be Blood...Type A
programme.desc: Allison and her daughters share the same dream of a strange girl who may be linked to a string of murders. Meanwhile, Joe has another disagreement with his boss.

programme.title: Medium: There Will Be Blood...Type B
programme.desc: Allison discovers that the strange girl from her and her daughters' dreams is the serial killer's next target, and she must protect the girl from danger while also trying to work with her to catch the killer.

programme.title: Medium: Sal
programme.desc: Allison installs a high-tech talking burglar alarm after a neighbor is murdered, which she later discovers might be communicating with Marie.

programme.title: Medium: Time Keeps On Slipping
programme.desc: Ariel somehow loses years of time in her life and must find a way to get back to the present.

programme.title: Medium: Dead Meat
programme.desc: Allison's friendship with a pig could lead to the whereabouts of a missing animal rights activist. Meanwhile, Joe gets a special birthday gift from Marie.

programme.title: Medium: It's A Wonderful Death
programme.desc: In the sixth season finale, Allison's brain tumor returns, which may prove to have major consequences for not only her, but her loved ones as well.

programme.title: Medium: Bring Your Daughter To Work Day
programme.desc: When Allison and Bridgette have the same dream, they end up swapping personalities, causing chaos for both of them.
programme.sub-title: Bring Your Daughter To Work Day

programme.title: Medium: The Match Game
programme.desc: Allison begins to see floating symbols above people's heads, signs that she thinks could match people up with their mates.

programme.title: Medium: Means And Ends
programme.desc: Scanlon's haunting dreams of his late brother leave Allison concerned for her partner.

programme.title: Medium: How To Kill A Good Guy
programme.desc: Allison continues to find herself at odds with Scanlon when she thinks his late brother could be linked to a missing girl's murder.
programme.sub-title: How To Kill A Good Guy

programme.title: Medium: Talk To The Hand
programme.desc: After getting a skin graft on her hand, Allison is perplexed when the same hand starts moving with a mind of its own.

programme.title: Medium: Where Were You When..?
programme.desc: When Allison flashes to a specific time in the future, her fear grows as she begins to feel powerless to stop a catastrophic event from taking place.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 3
programme.desc: A fuel tanker has rolled down a steep, muddy hill and must be flipped over.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 4
programme.desc: Recovery op Steve must deal with a mattress-stuffed lorry which has hit a low bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 5
programme.desc: A three-tonne passenger ferry is hauled out of the icy waters of a lake for repairs,

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
programme.desc: Recovery op Mark tackles a Vauxhall left dangling over the edge of a narrow canal lock.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 7
programme.desc: In Croydon, Stu has a complex recovery: a bin lorry is stuck in deep mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 8
programme.desc: A fully loaded 26-tonne tanker gets stuck in a waterlogged verge on the busy A5.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 9
programme.desc: Two coaches which tried passing each other on a narrow snowy lane come to grief.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 10
programme.desc: Kevin is winching a tanker which is leaning perilously close to an ancient wall.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: Rescuing a burnt-out low loader and portacabin and a bus blocking a mini roundabout.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: Steve tackles an emergency when a lorry deposits a hazardous load.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13
programme.desc: A 46-tonne artic has veered into a verge on a busy road and is going nowhere without help.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14
programme.desc: A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15
programme.desc: Action in this episode includes a burning truck full of bricks on the A69.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 16
programme.desc: The Alpha Recovery team face a challenge as a double decker bus has rolled onto its side,

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 17
programme.desc: A tipper truck sinks into deep mud on an isolated farm track.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18
programme.desc: A 26-ton truck breaks down beside the London Eye.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19
programme.desc: A bin lorry has come off a country lane, its wheels slipping in mud.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 20
programme.desc: A recovery pushes Jordan and Merrie's skills and tenacity to the limit.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 1
programme.desc: The Beast from the East descends, causing chaos on the roads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: To better camouflage themselves as real Fire Nation citizens, the kids check out a Fire Nation school. Also, Zuko confronts Uncle.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: The gang arrive at a suffering Fire Nation fishing village, and a mysterious spirit appears to help the villagers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: Sokka feels that he is not contributing enough to the group, and searches for a mysterious master to teach him the ways of the sword.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Zuko, Azula, Mai, and Ty Lee go on vacation at Lo and Li's beach house, where they learn a lot about themselves and each other. Meanwhile, the kids face a new enemy.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: Aang and Zuko are taken on parallel adventures that give them insight into their forefathers' pasts, but how does the tale of Roku and Sozin matter to them now?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: When Toph discovers a quick way to make cash, Katara disapproves, and the rift between them has disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: In a spooky village, Katara makes a special connection; the group investigate strange disappearances that occur during full moons.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: On the eve of the eclipse, Aang's worry overtakes him and his dreams become nightmares. Before long, he can't tell the difference between what's real and what's not.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: With the day of the eclipse upon them, the kids, along with a ragtag force of old friends, enact their long-planned invasion of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: As the invasion force fights their way to the Fire Nation capital, the kids help Aang find the Firelord in time for the eclipse, but after a few surprises.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: When the group seek refuge at the Western Air temple, they find someone they weren't expecting has been following them and hopes to join their group.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: As Zuko teaches Aang firebending, it turns out Aang isn't the only one who needs a lesson. The two set-out to learn the true meaning of Firebending from the original teachers.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko head to the Fire Nation's most heavily guarded prison - the Boiling Rock - in hopes to find and break-out the captured invasion force.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Sokka and Zuko have to rethink their escape plan after things go wrong. They end up getting help from a few unexpected sources.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Katara sets out to confront the Fire Nation soldier who killed her mother. However, no one knows what she will do when she finds him.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: When the kids see a new play about themselves and all of their past adventures, they aren't happy with the production.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 18
programme.desc: The kids learn new information about Firelord Ozai's master plan and decide to strike sooner than planned, but they are unsure if Aang is ready.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 19
programme.desc: While Firelord Ozai begins his master plan, the gang tries to stop him. Meanwhile, Aang seeks advice from his past lives.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 20
programme.desc: Suki, Toph, and Sokka try to stop the Fire Lord's fleet before they hit land, while Azula prepares for her coronation day.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 21
programme.desc: Sokka and Toph manage to disable the airships while Zuko and Katara confront Azula. Aang finally faces off against the Fire Lord.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 1
programme.desc: Katara and Sokka, a brother and sister from the Southern Water Tribe, discover a twelve-year-old boy frozen in an iceberg. Katara wonders if this boy is the Avatar whom the world has been awaiting.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 2
programme.desc: Prince Zuko, a young Firebender whose mission in life is to capture the Avatar, tracks Aang down to the Southern Water Tribe village where Katara and Sokka live.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 3
programme.desc: Aang is eager to take Sokka and Katara to the Air Temple where he was raised. But upon arrival, it becomes apparent that the temple is not at all how Aang remembers it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 4
programme.desc: When locals of a small island discover Aang is the Avatar, they treat him like a celebrity.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 5
programme.desc: Aang takes Katara and Sokka to an Earthbender city. The kids cause damage and are brought before a crazy old king, who seems to enjoy messing with the kids' heads.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 6
programme.desc: The kids come to an Earth Nation town which is occupied by the Fire Nation. But will Katara's attempts to inspire the oppressed people help them or hurt them?

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 7
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka arrive at a town being terrorized by a mysterious force from the spirit world. Aang doesn't know how to help these people, and realizes he has much to learn about being Avatar.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 8
programme.desc: During the winter solstice, Aang must reach a Fire Nation temple while dodging Prince Zuko, Commander Zhao, and the Fire Sages who guard it.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 9
programme.desc: When Katara's desire to master Waterbending gets the best of her, the kids find themselves on the run from pirates.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 10
programme.desc: Our heroes' friendship is tested when they meet Jet, a charismatic teenager leading a band of rebels who are fighting against the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 11
programme.desc: When Aang and friends come to the rim of a giant canyon, they are asked to help guide two groups of refugees across. Aang quickly learns that this will be no easy task.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 12
programme.desc: A powerful storm brings up painful memories of the past - and puts everyone in jeopardy in the present.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 13
programme.desc: When Sokka and Katara get too sick to travel, Aang goes out on his own to find a cure for them. But he is captured by Zhao and held prisoner inside an impenetrable fortress.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 14
programme.desc: Aang, Katara, and Sokka discover a village of people who are all reliant on a fortuneteller in their everyday lives but they are so reliant that they are blind to the imminent danger they are all in.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 15
programme.desc: Aang feels insecure when Katara and Sokka come across something that reminds them of home. Because Aang thinks his friends might leave him, he hides an important message which only leads to trouble.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 16
programme.desc: Aang attempts to find a Firebending master to teach him while Katara learns that she possesses a special power.

programme.title: Avatar: The Last Airbender: Ep 17
programme.desc: After hearing rumors about surviving Airbenders, the kids journey to the Northern Air temple to see for themselves. What they find there could spell disaster for all enemies of the Fire Nation.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): State of Shock
programme.desc: After defeating a mysterious group of ninjas at the Emeryville Power Station, the Turtles decode part of a map that they were able to liberate from the would-be thieves.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Cry H.A.V.O.C.!
programme.desc: The Turtles get the drop on masked thieves hijacking a jewellery store, only to have themselves arrested for the crime! Before the turtles can be booked, they are rescued by the mutants Amok and Overdrive.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): H.A.V.O.C. in the Streets!
programme.desc: Titanus sends of couple of his H.A.V.O.C.mutants to bust into the aerospace plant and steal some much needed equipment. Only problem is that the Turtles were waiting for them.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: Krakus
programme.desc: Krakus, a cop from the future, arrives and thinking that the Turtles are in league with Titanus, shakes them down for information.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Trek
programme.desc: Krang activates his new dimensional portal, thanks to Shredder's installation of the Energy Transmitter at the Power Relay Station, giving him access to Dimension X.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Unknown Ninja
programme.desc: While watching video tapes of old battles, Raphael sees a mystery person spying on them. While the Turtles investigate, an alien warlord named Dregg sends his TechnoGansters to steal all the gold on Earth.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Dregg of the Earth
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to let them know that Dregg has landed on Earth and is preparing a press conference. The Turtles rush to meet April at the Park, where they hear Dregg announce his intentions and offers the world his molecular converter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Wrath of Medusa
programme.desc: Believing that the Turtles are the only thing that stands between him and total domination of the planet, Dregg makes contact with Medusa, a sinisterly beautiful alien.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Showdown
programme.desc: April contacts the Turtles to inform them that all the TV stations in the City are jammed. Sleazebug tries to recruit the Turtles for a martial arts tournament.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Split-Second
programme.desc: Carter, April and the Turtles investigate a break-in at the Antique Timepiece Museum. Convinced that Dregg is responsible, the Turtles discover a clue on a wall display.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Carter the Enforcer
programme.desc: Splinter convinces the Turtles that it is their duty to fight evil, even when the whole world is against them. Carter and the Turtles team up with April to get the goods on Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Return of Dregg
programme.desc: While the Turtles work on using fragments of the Vortex Crystal to stabilize their mutations, Lord Dregg plans to use the fragments to create another Vortex Crystal to power his Vortex Transporter.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Beginning of the End
programme.desc: While Raphael, Michelangelo, Donatello and Carter work on restoring Leonardo to his regular self, Mung steals all the plutonium from a power plant in order for Dregg to build a Plutonium Ray to turn Leonardo into a radioactive killer.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Power of Three
programme.desc: Mungg informs Dregg that he came across two individuals who claimed they were old acquaintances of the turtles: Shredder and Krang!

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Turtle in Time
programme.desc: The Turtles', Shredder's and Krang's battles skills, powers, and memories are absorbed into Dregg.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles to the Second Power
programme.desc: Dregg and his crew plan an invasion of Earth to make it his new home base, but first he has to get his transporter chip back from Shredder.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Day the Earth Disappeared
programme.desc: With the city breaking apart, the Turtles head to the street to investigate and see the Dreggnaut appear in the sky. With Mung's help, Dregg reprograms the transporter to open a warp in space.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Divide and Conquer
programme.desc: Lord Dregg launches a final attack on the Ninja Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtle Tracks
programme.desc: April O'Neil, ace reporter for Channel 6, investigates recent break-ins, allegedly by Ninjas, which have resulted in the thefts of numerous technologies.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Shredder
programme.desc: The Shredder kidnaps Splinter in an attempt to lure the Turtles to his own cause. In order to rescue Splinter the Turtles must enter the Shredder's mobile fortress and brave its dangerous weaponry.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): A Thing about Rats
programme.desc: Baxter Stockman, a mad scientist, is showing an exterminator his new invention: a rat catching robot called Mousers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Shredder experiments with the Inter-Dimensional Portal, hoping to contact Krang's' Rock Soldiers and prepare an invasion of Earth.
programme.sub-title: Hot Rodding Teenagers from Dimension X

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Shredder & Splintered
programme.desc: Shredder lures Splinter into the Technodrome, this time with the promise that a weapon in his possession can restore the sensei to human form.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Shredder
programme.desc: Shredder trains students at the Dojo for a crooked Turtles gang. The mock turtles' crime spree starts turning the public against Michelangelo, Raphael, Donatello and Leonardo.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Incredible Shrinking Turtles
programme.desc: In the first of a four-parter, the amazing amphibians search for the segments of the powerful crystal Eye of Sarnoth. Shredder cuts the Turtles down to size, literally.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): It Came from Beneath the Sewers
programme.desc: In the second of a four-parter about the pursuit of the Eye of Sarnoth, the Turtles are attacked by a huge alien plant that is making New York into a jungle.
programme.sub-title: It Came from Beneath the Sewers

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Mean Machines
programme.desc: The hunt for the Eye of Sarnoth continues in the third of a four-parter with the Turtles in Groucho-like disguises. Shredder hooks up a fragment of the Eye to the computer Omnus.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Curse of the Evil Eye
programme.desc: Shredder is in control of the Eye of Sarnoth, enabling him to transmute matter. Shredder brings to life a dragon which soars through the air with shocked shellbacks Leonardo and Michelangelo aboard.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Case of the Killer Pizzas
programme.desc: The Turtles' favourite food, pizza, is also the source of their problem. Nasty, fanged creatures have been planted in pizza boxes! When the critters crack open their chrysalises, they become enormous.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Enter: The Fly
programme.desc: Shredder sends April a rare duko plant that renders her unconscious. The Turtles seek a rare leaf that can serve as an antidote.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Invasion of the Punk Frogs
programme.desc: Mutagen, sent by Krang from Dimension X, changes four Florida frogs into half-human creatures four and a half feet tall. Shredder, training them in his evil ways, names them Attila the Frog, Genghis Frog, Rasputin the Mad Frog and Napoleon Bonafrog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Splinter No More
programme.desc: Michelangelo senses that their mentor is "mondo depressed" and Donatello finds a way of changing back Splinter the rat to Yoshi the man.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): New York's Shiniest
programme.desc: Shredder taps into New York's computers to steal plans for robots and creates an army of robots to destroy the Turtles and loot the city.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Teenagers from Dimension X
programme.desc: Neutrino teens Kala, Zak and Eask arrive on Earth and alert the Turtles to Shredder's latest plan to make "mindless zombies" of the Turtles.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): The Catwoman from Channel 6
programme.desc: A matter transporter results in strange happenings including TV reporter April O'Neil being put into a cat-like state and a tiger chasing the Turtles and Splinter, their mentor-rat.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Return of the Technodrome
programme.desc: To bring the Technodrome back to Earth, Shredder is instructed to take over the Niagara Falls hydroelectric station.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Beneath These Streets
programme.desc: While the Turtles, in disguise, are at a movie, Shredder interrupts a press conference to steal a new medi-laser.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1987): Turtles on Trial
programme.desc: While the Turtles go on a talk show to prove their innocence to the world, Krang steals a robot and some Solarbenite from a military warehouse, with the intention of destroying the Turtles himself.

programme.title: Corporate: The One Who's There

programme.title: Corporate: The Tragedy

programme.title: Corporate: Vacation

programme.title: Corporate: The Fall
programme.desc: The Fall: Hampton DeVille goes all in on marketing end-of-the-world preparedness, leading Matt to quit and Jake to take on a secret project. Satirical sitcom from Comedy Central U.S. (S2, E10)

programme.desc: Kimchee gets conflicting dating advice from Jung and Shannon. Janet's outraged when she learns that Umma's sold off her childhood keepsakes.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Appanticitis

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Hit 'n' Fun
programme.desc: A small fender bender leads to a big argument between Appa and Umma. Jung second-guesses a birthday greeting. Janet goes from mocker to mocked.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Lord of the Ring

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Couch Surfing
programme.desc: Appa is reluctant to have a house guest, but Umma is the one who ends up having problems with their visitor. Jung accuses Janet of being coldhearted and Shannon tackles workplace bullying .

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: The Help
programme.desc: Umma is mistaken for a server at a school event for Janet. Appa takes up math tutoring to prove his teaching prowess. Meanwhile, Shannon is finally single but isn't sure if Jung will make a move.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Happy Ummaversary
programme.desc: Janet plans to get the Kim family together for their first family dinner in 15 years, but it almost proves too much for Jung and Appa to handle.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Thinkin' About Inkin'
programme.desc: Janet considers a new tattoo. Jung and Shannon exchange five-week-iversary gifts. Umma and Appa discover some juicy gossip about Pastor Nina.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Soccer Dad
programme.desc: Appa unwittingly becomes Jung's soccer coach. Umma insists that Janet learn to cook. Shannon forces a birthday party on Stacie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Beacon of Truth
programme.desc: Appa eavesdrops on Gerald and Chelsea getting together to tell a lie to her parents. Appa says that he knows whenever Janet has told a lie.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Chammo!
programme.desc: Janet is commissioned to take portraits of Shannon's cats. Umma entrusts Jung to pick Appa up from the dentist, but things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: Which Witch is Which
programme.desc: Umma reevaluates her role as a mother. Appa comes into money and tries to do a good thing with it. Jung and Shannon discover they have different concepts of sexy.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience: In the Bedroom
programme.desc: Appa and Umma come up with a new sleeping arrangement. Jung pursues a new career and tries to involve Janet. Meanwhile, Shannon and Kimchee discover a new, slightly terrifying side of Terence.

programme.desc: The death of a man trying to resolve the death of his son, turns into a murder trial.

programme.desc: Major Kessler releases an illegal Russian stripper as a political favour, sparking a scandal that climaxes in murder.

programme.desc: After a wild night on the town in the port of Samjung, one member of the Hammersley crew wakes to find he has a crushing hangover, a beautiful woman by his side - and a wedding ring on his finger.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 012
programme.desc: Hammersley is deployed to intercept GD Security mercenary vessel, the MV Sassy and escort her back to port. Maxine asks for Mike's help in finding Ryan who went AWOL, having left before his discharge papers gone through.

programme.title: Sea Patrol: Episode 013
programme.desc: The crew of the Hammersley race to disarm a dirty bomb. Meanwhile, Kate ponders a proposal from Jim.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues an incredible story of a woman brutally raped at age 15. Loretta identified the alleged rapist and helped police put him behind bars. But her world was rocked 14 years later when the man, Dean, was exonerated due to DNA evidence. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Could You Be An Eyewitness? Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: The tense family drama continues. Dr. Phil sent Private Investigator Harold Copus thousands of miles through three countries including the jungles of Belize to find two sisters, Allene and Mollie, who were abducted by their father one year ago. Part 3

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Mom, Vicki, has been married to Marissa's dad, Robert, for 34 years. Marissa discovered her dad was having an "affair" and visiting "porn" and "call girl" websites. Robert, a former pastor, admits a relationship, but insists he's a victim.
programme.sub-title: The Pastor, His Wife, The Call Girl And The Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Every parent can tell you that raising a child is often demanding, thankless, hard work. But when a teenager gets pregnant and has a child, the result can be stress and chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Mother God's Followers And Alleged Victims Face Off Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Richard says his 6-yr marriage to Kelli ended due to her obsession with "stuff"! The couple, divorced now 12 yrs, is considering re-marriage but only if Kelli stops hoarding. You won't believe what producers saw & found when the home was tested for mold.
programme.sub-title: Hoarding Ultimatum: Your Junk Or Me!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trust has been ranked as the #1 crucial quality for a happy marriage. Deanne & Brian have been married for 12 years with four children between them. Now, due to alleged lies and infidelity, their family is torn apart and divorce is just a signature away.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil follows up with Charles and Tracy. After coming to the conclusion that his dream of being shared by his wife and mistress was never going to happen, did Charles follow through and end his relationship with the other woman? Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: When you and your beloved say "I do," it's "for better or worse." But what happens when all you feel is the "worse" part and wind up trapped in a bad marriage?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Brian, Liz, & Bethany. Now former friend Sarah says she lies as her "real" life is "not very exciting." Michelle, who is a cancer survivor and former friend of Sarah's, confronts Sarah for the first time. Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Liar, Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his mission to end the silence on domestic violence. More than 25 percent of battered women remain in a relationship with their abuser. Sonya fears that she is one of those women who stay. Hear her story.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jennifer claims her family has been the victim of hackers for 2 years. The problem is her husband, Billy, thinks she is the hacker! Things are so bad that Billy has asked for a divorce. Jennifer says she wants to clear her name & save her marriage! Pt.1
programme.sub-title: My Husband Thinks I Hacked Our Devices: Clear My Name Pt.1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bridget says she's not sure what to believe about the relationship between her 38-year-old brother-in-law, Kevin, and 16-year-old daughter, Grace. Dr. Phil sits down one-on-one with Kevin. How does Kevin explain his actions? Pt. 2
programme.sub-title: Uncle Kevin Answers The Accusations Pt.2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In one of the most twisted & bizarre love deceptions ever on Dr. Phil, 7 female college students from Brigham Young University face the man they say they fell in love with online but never met in person. Don't miss the surprising twist in this story!
programme.sub-title: Exclusive: The Co-Eds And The Catfish

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: A recent study shows that the number of men and women having extramarital affairs is on the rise. Could your spouse be cheating on you? Dr. Phil's guests are struggling with the aftermath of infidelity.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Do you know someone whose private persona is dramatically different from the face he or she shows to the world? Dr. Phil's guests say their mates lead a double life, and it's wreaking havoc on their relationships.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Almost 75% of people don't like their neighbors citing some of the following reasons: 'odd vibes', 'too loud', or 'flat-out rude'. Dr. Phil sorts out this unusual feud: Iguanas wreak havoc in Florida and the feud with the neighbor who feeds them!
programme.sub-title: Feuding Neighbors: Stop Feeding The Iguanas!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Was this teacher drunk In her elementary school classroom? Listen to what this educator has to say.
programme.sub-title: Was This Teacher Drunk In Her Elementary School Classroom?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: What happens when an unhealthy relationship threatens to tear a mother and daughter apart? Giesel says her 18-year-old daughter is boyfriend-obsessed and is damaging her promising future. Watch drama unfold as a pregnancy scare rocks this teen's life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: While battling cancer, Paula learned her 21-year-old daughter, C.J., had been turning to drugs, and that her husband had an affair. Can this family come together to save C.J.?

programme.title: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! Pimp My Ride: CRAZIEST MODIFICATIONS! 1989 Ford Escort
programme.desc: Xzibit shows you how to transform your tired old car into a fully loaded cruisin' machine. Today, Kerry gets his 1989 Ford Escort pimped with a DVD, MP3 player, GPS and internet access.

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie's illness takes a dramatic turn for the worse, Aaron and Talia make a massive step in the right direction and Holly hits the hat shop with her mam. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey return to the scene of an old argument. Aaron hits the dirt bike track and Holly comes face to face with the past at her hen party. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: The OGs are back but will Aaron and Talia's relationship survive a new baby? Will Marnie and Casey stay strong after a recent split? Will Holly and Jacob ever get married? (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie plans some big life goals. Holly finds her dream home, but will she get a mortgage? Sophie realises her friends are moving on but she isn't. Aaron goes all out for Talia's birthday. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Marnie and Casey view houses but do they want the same things? Holly pursues her PT qualifications while Aaron deals with his choking fears. Sophie embarks on an interesting journey. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Sophie visits Charlotte for advice, Holly visits Charlotte Dawson and gets fired up. Aaron and Talia visit her family. Marnie gets a visit from her wedding planner who brings bad news. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly goes ahead with her "warts an' all" Body Confidence photoshoot! Sophie reveals some truths to a life coach. Marnie and Casey have got wedding venue issues. It's Romeo's 1st Birthday! (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly posts the Body Confidence photos and is noticed by a Kardashian! Aaron's eyeing his first boxing match and Marnie falls in love with a million-pound pad. (S4, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Holly turns to the spiritual world for wedding answers. Marnie's million pound home offer is accepted and Talia's waters break prematurely, sparking dramatic events. (S4, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron's worried when Talia has to stay in hospital. Sophie embraces single life and Holly's pleased when Jacob meets an Ex-Pro to talk about life after football. (S4, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Maddox is home but Talia's struggling post C-Section. Sophie invests in her own beauty business. Marnie's dream house move might be back on and Government travel restrictions impact Holly. (S4, ep9)

programme.title: Geordie OGs
programme.desc: Aaron misses his train to a press conference announcing his big fight, will he make it in time? Holly gets a tattoo removed and Marnie has her baby scan. Gary invites Aaron to meet Chester. (S1, ep1)

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tom Arnold
programme.desc: Tom Arnold heads into the unpredictable coastal mountains of Oregon. They take a helicopter to an isolated forest, hike through woodland, catch a trout and cross a river with the help of a log.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Tamron Hall's tenacious personality shines through as Bear pushes her to her limits.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Ed Helms
programme.desc: Actor Ed Helms faces sheer cliffs, crumbling rock and a cringeworthy dinner menu while atop Colorado mountains; Helms discusses the road to his career in comedy.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Julianne Hough
programme.desc: Bear and actress Julianne Hough navigate the unforgiving terrain and wild animals of the African savanna; Julianne talks about her adolescence and her determination to succeed.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Kate Winslett
programme.desc: Acclaimed movie star Kate Winslet takes a role like never before, as Bear paramotors them both to the top of the Snowdonia Mountains in Wales.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Deon Sanders
programme.desc: Bear Grylls takes NFL hall of famer Deion Sanders to the mesas and canyons of Utah for his first ever camping trip.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, President Barack Obama
programme.desc: President Barack Obama and Bear Grylls explore the Alaskan wilderness, where they observe evidence of climate change, sample wild salmon and catkins tea made with water from melting glaciers; Obama discusses his official duties, parenthood and faith.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Uzo Aduba
programme.desc: Uzo Aduba joins Bear on a harrowing journey to Spain's Pyrenees Mountains, where they face a poisonous viper and secure a dinner of field mice; Uzo shares the story of her path to fame and her family's emigration from Nigeria.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Michelle Rodriguez
programme.desc: Actress Michelle Rodriguez and Bear go to a desert Nevada; unexpected high winds during a sky-diving trip send Michelle off course; Michelle and Bear must come up with clever ways to stay hydrated.
programme.sub-title: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Michelle Rodriguez

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Joseph Gordon-Levitt
programme.desc: Bear and Joseph Gordon-Levitt navigate Kenya's unyielding terrain; Joseph and Bear navigate a perilous rappel, milk a camel for hydration, ascend a massive rock dome and battle a crocodile for dinner; Joseph talks about his family and rise to fame.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Scott Eastwood
programme.desc: Actor Scott Eastwood joins Bear on a journey through the harsh Bulgarian outback; the duo rappel from a towering arch, cross a raging river, descend into a dark cave and face off against a snake; Scott details growing up with his famous father.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, James Marsden
programme.desc: X-man' James Marsden joins Bear on an adventure into the heart Rattle Snake Canyon in Utah, where they helicopter on to one of the highest arches in the area.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Don Cheadle
programme.desc: Actor Don Cheadle joins Bear on a trek through the mountains of New England, which includes crossing a raging river and a climb to a towering railroad bridge. Bear considers a porcupine carcass for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Drew Brees
programme.desc: Bear Grylls ventures deep into Panama's Camino de Cruces jungle with Super Bowl winning quarterback Drew Brees, exploring caves and wrestling a six-foot crocodile.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Shaquille O'Neal
programme.desc: Bear and NBA legend Shaquille O'Neal are lifted from a freight train via helicopter and whisked away to a dense forest in the remote Adirondacks; they face blood-sucking leeches, and a 200-foot rock face as they search for their exit.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Marshawn Lynch
programme.desc: Bear and Super Bowl champion Marshawn Lynch tackle a rugged mountain range that has sharp cliffs and dark chasms; the pair comes face to face with the French Foreign Legion and pursues a wild hog for dinner.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Roger Federer
programme.desc: Bear takes one of the best athletes of all time, Roger Federer, on a daring adventure through the Swiss Alps as they attempt to navigate the tough terrain. They descend a frozen waterfall and use tennis rackets as snowshoes.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Zac Efron
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Zac Efron heads into the Appalachian wilderness of the Catskill Mountains in New York. They parachute into the woods, rappel down cliffs and search for shelter.
programme.sub-title: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Zac Efron

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: Bear Grylls, Lena Headey
programme.desc: Lena Headey and Bear journey through Spain's Iberian Peninsula; they rappel from a towering ridge, dine on bone marrow from a goat carcass and cross a lake using a makeshift raft during an unexpected storm; Lena details her life and rise to stardom.

programme.title: Running Wild With Bear Grylls: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Courtney Cox
programme.desc: Actress Courteney Cox joins Bear to challenge herself into sharp edged discomfort amidst the jagged peaks and descending cliffs on the windswept coast of Ireland.
programme.sub-title: 7 Celebrities,7 Days, 7 Craziest Challenges with Bear Grylls starting: Courtney Cox

programme.title: JAG: Trinity
programme.desc: Harm and his new partner, Marine Major Sara MacKenzie are drawn into a game of revenge when they're sent to Belfast, Ireland, to represent the legal interests of a Navy Lieutenant whose infant son has seemingly been abducted.

programme.title: JAG: Secrets
programme.desc: Admiral Chegwidden, Mac and Bud Roberts are taken hostage in the Admiral's office by Pvt. Magida, a Marine who escaped from a nearby Federal prison.

programme.title: JAG: Ghosts
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate an attempt on Admiral Chedwiggen's life and uncover the fact that all the members of his former SEAL team have died under mysterious circumstances.

programme.title: JAG: Full Engagement
programme.desc: While on their day off, Harm takes Mac for a flight in his vintage airplane, only to be forced to make an emergency landing in a mountain clearing because of mechanical problems.

programme.title: JAG: Cowboys and Cossaks
programme.desc: Harm, Mac, and Bud are assigned sea duty to monitor a joint war games exercise between U.S. and Russian naval forces.

programme.title: JAG: The Guardian
programme.desc: Harm and Mac defend Bauwer, a former Navy Seal, now a homeless man, who's accused of using excessive force when he killed three men who tried to hold up a convenience store.

programme.title: JAG: Rendevous
programme.desc: Mac and Harm once again find themselves courtroom adversaries as Mac is assigned the difficult task of defending CPO Holst, an admitted wife abuser accused of murdering his wife's boyfriend.

programme.title: JAG: Ghost Ship
programme.desc: Harm and Mac investigate the discovery of a skeleton found hidden aboard a decommissioned aircraft carrier that is being cut up for scrap, and learn it is all that remains of a long-missing JAG officer.

programme.title: JAG: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert
programme.desc: The top female gunship pilot at the Yuma Marine Base is charged with disobeying an order to stop "fraternizing" with her crew chief, a married, enlisted man. Mac is assigned as prosecutor and Harm is set as Susan's defense attorney.
programme.sub-title: The Court Martial of Sandra Gilbert

programme.title: JAG: Vanished
programme.desc: Concerns regarding the mysterious disappearance of a fully armed Navy F-14 during a storm lead Harm's investigation to consider such diverse scenarios as pilot suicide, terrorism, the Bermuda Triangle curse, or UFO interference.

programme.title: JAG: King of the Fleas
programme.desc: Having just stabbed a man on a street-corner, Willie, a wheelchair-bound former Vietnam POW arrives at JAG headquarters to report "a 30-year-old murder" which he's just committed. Willie relates that while imprisoned he knew Harm's father.

programme.title: JAG: Against All Enemies
programme.desc: Harm, Mac and Bud board an aircraft carrier in the Sea of Japan to investigate the accidental shooting down of a North Korean civilian airliner by Navy jets.

programme.title: JAG: Impact
programme.desc: Harm and Bud investigate the crash of a Marine helicopter whose dead pilot is being blamed for the incident. They discover the chopper seems to have been hit by some form of UFO. Government security officials want to maintain a cover-up at all costs.

programme.title: JAG: People V. Rabb
programme.desc: Harm is arrested by the FBI for the murder of Konaplanik, a Russian who was selling Harm supposedly accurate information about his missing father's whereabouts. The killer turns out to be Col. Tomashevsky, a Russian agent.

programme.title: JAG: Defensless
programme.desc: A woman Navy ensign shoots and kills a Turkish colonel; she claims self-defense.

programme.title: JAG: With Intent to Die
programme.desc: With help from Harm, Mac, Harriet, and Bud, Admiral Chedwiggen investigates the apparent suicide of his mentor, Admiral Clancy, who allegedly shot himself while on a hunting trip. Harm and company ultimately uncover who the killer was.

programme.title: JAG: Father's Day
programme.desc: Mac and Harm are assigned the task of defending a young Marine whose frustration at being unable to wrest custody of his son has led to his being court-martialed for dereliction of duty.

programme.title: JAG: Tiger, Tiger
programme.desc: Harm takes Josh on a weekend cruise for Navy families aboard a frigate. When the frigate is taken over by terrorists who intend to fire missiles at Cuba, Harm and Bud take matters into their own hands to stop the evil plot.

programme.title: JAG: Return of Mimmy Blackhorse
programme.desc: An Army forensic pathologist joins forces with Harm, Mac, Bud and Harriet as they try to verify that newly unearthed human remains are those of a heroic Navajo "code-talker" who had been missing since WWII.

programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: COPS starts at 9pm
programme.desc: Cops gives viewers access into the daily lives and work of the men and women of law enforcement. Filmed on location, the groundbreaking series follows real officers on patrol as they conduct high-speed pursuits, wild arrests and dangerous police business.

programme.title: Random Breath Test
programme.desc: A reality show on real alcohol and drug testing performed on Australian roads by the Police's RBT Squad.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fishy moped license plate foils a potential burglary, a violent stalker is arrested trying to beat down a door, and an arson suspect is caught in the nude.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets busted during a drug deal, a cyclist gets confused when an officer finds narcotics in his pants, and officers respond to reports of gunfire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A daring driver takes officers on a wild ride, a man offers a bizarre excuse for the items found in his car, and a man is arrested after threatening his neighbor with a gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers suspect meth use by a man sleeping in a bus station, a pedestrian's multiple bags of drugs suggest trafficking, and a drunk driver claims she was set up.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young woman claims not to know her passengers, the search of a man's car leads to more charges, and a woman learns not to start vehicles with a screwdriver.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted woman gives deputies a fake name, but her brother accidentally reveals the truth, and two officers respond to a domestic dispute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man sprints across a freeway to evade police, a woman is arrested for breaking her friend's windows, and a driver tries to talk his way out of a road rage arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A sluggish suspect attempts to outrun the police, officers try to piece together a wild fight between neighbors, and a man's plot to extort money from an ex goes awry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police go off-roading to follow a stolen car, a man has odd excuses for having suspicious items, and an officer settles a dispute between a wife and her jealous husband.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing motorcyclist crashes into an occupied trailer, a stubborn suspect plays dumb, and officers are disappointed when they run into a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Fort Bend, Texas deputies arrest a man for possession of a crack pipe, and Michigan and Washington police both respond to domestic violence situations.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A fleeing vehicle leads an officer on a hot pursuit, a deputy encounters a nervous driver with a big secret, and a young cyclist tries to make a quick getaway.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers split up to interrogate two men suspected of stealing a pick-up truck, a motorist tries to ditch a bag of meth, and police discover a bunch of syringes in a vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A traffic stop takes a surprising turn when a suspect creates a spur-of-the-moment diversion, and a soft-spoken driver has difficulty being upfront with the officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A convenience store sprinter bets officers he'll get away next time, matching bullets help solve an armed robbery, and a trucker takes his family on a supersized car chase.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A cyclist leads officers on a low-speed chase, a motorist who led police on a dangerous chase feigns ignorance, and a couple's date ends with a totaled car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A quiet passenger makes a run for it during a traffic stop, a stolen puppy is safely returned to its family, and a struggling woman hits a speed bump on her road to recovery.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a motorcycle evades an officer, a woman in a suspicious vehicle accrues multiple charges, and a traffic stop reveals two men under the influence.
