programme.title: The Love Boat: Happy Ending / We Three / April's Love
programme.desc: A tantalizing entertainer (Charo) receives some unwanted advice on love from members of the crew, who don't approve of her marriage plans.
programme.sub-title: Happy Ending / We Three / April's Love

programme.title: The Love Boat: Kinfolk / Sis & The Slicker / Moonlight & Moonshine / Too Close For Comfort / The Affair - Part 1
programme.desc: In a special two-hour presentation, a singer (Donny Osmond) trying to break into show business finds out unexpectedly that his hillbilly family has decided to take the cruise.
programme.sub-title: Kinfolk / Sis & The Slicker / Moonlight & Moonshine / Too Close For Comfort / The Affair - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: Rent A Romeo / Matchmaker, Matchmaker / Y'gotta Have Heart
programme.desc: Doc (Bernie Kopell) comes down with a bad case of heartache when the beautiful girl (Misty Rowe) he wants to be alone with boards ship with her ever-present sister (Vicki Lawrence).
programme.sub-title: Rent A Romeo / Matchmaker, Matchmaker / Y'gotta Have Heart

programme.title: The Love Boat: Dumb Luck / Tres Amigos / Hey, Jealous Lover
programme.desc: A brilliant plain-Jane (Shelley Hack) becomes a fetching glamour gal with the help of Julie (Lauren Tewes), and falls in love with a man (Kevin Tighe) who has some mistaken ideas about her.
programme.sub-title: Dumb Luck / Tres Amigos / Hey, Jealous Lover

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Invisible Maniac / September Song / Peekaboo
programme.desc: Isaac (Ted Lange) finds himself in a precarious position when he meets a beautiful former school chum (Bernadette Stanis) and her macho husband (Clifton Davis).
programme.sub-title: The Invisible Maniac / September Song / Peekaboo

programme.title: The Love Boat: Marriage-A-Thon Cruise / The Promoter - Part 1
programme.desc: Romance and comic intrigue reign on the high seas as 25 engaged couples board the Pacific Princess to compete in a "Marriage-A-Thon Cruise." (Part 1)

programme.title: The Love Boat: Marriage-A-Thon Cruise / The Promoter - Part 2
programme.desc: Darren McGavin, as dynamic promoter Larry Evans, recruits the services of "The Love Boat" to take the brides-and-grooms-to-be, who are competing for a house, a car, and $50,000 in cash, on a cruise that will wind up in a mass wedding in Acapulco. (Part 2)

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Mallory Quest / The Offer / Julie, The Vamp - Part 1
programme.desc: The Love Boat sails on a fantastic voyage to the most exciting ports in the Caribbean with a famed mystery writer (Pernell Roberts) who is willing to pay $100,000 to one of his hand-picked guests to solve the mystery of his missing nephew.
programme.sub-title: The Mallory Quest / The Offer / Julie, The Vamp - Part 1

programme.title: The Love Boat: The Mallory Quest / The Offer / Julie, The Vamp - Part 2
programme.desc: Julie is accused by a woman (Lani O'Grady) of stealing her fiance (Bart Braverman).
programme.sub-title: The Mallory Quest / The Offer / Julie, The Vamp - Part 2

programme.title: The Love Boat: Tell Her She's Great / Matchmaker, Matchmaker Times Two / The Baby Alarm
programme.desc: Isaac causes comedic chaos when he convinces the crew to bolster his stagestruck aunt's (Isabel Sanford) ego, which turns her into an outrageous prima donna.
programme.sub-title: Tell Her She's Great / Matchmaker, Matchmaker Times Two / The Baby Alarm

programme.title: The Love Boat: Captian's Triangle/ Boomerang/ Out Of This World
programme.desc: Capt. Stubing gets trapped in a love triangle by his old girlfriend (Sue Ann Langdon), now married to the ship's former captain (Mont model (Pamela Sue Martin) attempts to insure her privacy
programme.sub-title: Captian's Triangle/ Boomerang/ Out Of This World

programme.title: The Love Boat: Isaac's Teacher / Seal Of Approval / The Successor
programme.desc: The First Lady of the Silent Screen, Lillian Gish, guest stars as Isaac's former English teacher, whom he tries to avoid.
programme.sub-title: Isaac's Teacher / Seal Of Approval / The Successor

programme.title: The Love Boat: From Here To Maternity / Jealousy / The Trigamist
programme.desc: A judge (Nancy Walker) finds herself attracted to a man (George Gobel) she has placed on probation for being married to three women at once.
programme.sub-title: From Here To Maternity / Jealousy / The Trigamist

programme.title: The Love Boat: Gopher's Bride / Workaholic / On Second Thought
programme.desc: Gopher and Doc battle for the affections of Gopher's gorgeous pen pal (Marie Laurin) who has come to live with him.
programme.sub-title: Gopher's Bride / Workaholic / On Second Thought

programme.title: The Love Boat: Lose One, Win One / For The Record / Mind My Wife
programme.desc: Doc has his arms full when he agrees to show his best friend's amorous wife (Jill St. John) a good time.
programme.sub-title: Lose One, Win One / For The Record / Mind My Wife

programme.title: The Love Boat: Bugged / Eye Of The Beholder / Lady From Sunshine Gardens
programme.desc: A nudist (Barbi Benton) gets help from an attorney (Peter Haskell) when she wants to bare it all on board.
programme.sub-title: Bugged / Eye Of The Beholder / Lady From Sunshine Gardens

programme.title: The Love Boat: Two For Julie / Aunt Hilly / The Duel
programme.desc: Academy Award-winning actress Olivia de Havilland stars as the captain's aunt, who may take away his daughter, Vicki, when she boards with her husband (Joseph Cotten).
programme.sub-title: Two For Julie / Aunt Hilly / The Duel

programme.title: Melrose Place: House Of God
programme.desc: Silence speaks volumes when an aloof new tenant, Jo Reynolds, moves in, and Jane and Michael suspect that their friend's wife is the victim of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Whole Truth
programme.desc: Jake and Jo become closer. Michael and Jane are discussing trying to have a baby.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Jake VS Jake
programme.desc: Jake is emotionally unprepared when an old girlfriend announces he has a son, while Alison realizes she needs help in dealing with her serious medical problems.

programme.title: Melrose Place: A Melrose Place Christmas
programme.desc: Tis the season for surprises when Alison comes out of surgery with a romantic revelation and Michael makes his first baby delivery.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Single White Sister
programme.desc: Jake has accompanied Jo to the beach for a very early morning session picture- taking. They find an increasing attraction developing between them. (TV-PG)

programme.title: Melrose Place: Peanut Butter And Jealousy
programme.desc: Some relationships aren't made to last as Jo considers going back to her old marriage and Jane bursts at the seams over her sister's overly friendly behavior.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Picture Imperfect
programme.desc: Advertising gets a whole lot sexier when Alison gets an unexpected job promotion, Amanda Woodward comes on board as her boss, and Jo takes some very revealing shots for an underwear ad.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Three's A Crowd
programme.desc: Things heat up fast when Jake and Jo move their relationship to the next level, and Amanda is immediately attracted to Alison's roommate, Billy, after a game of Truth or Dare.

programme.title: Melrose Place: My New Partner
programme.desc: There's a little too much of mixing business and pleasure when Alison confronts Billy about his dates with Amanda, and Jo has an interesting solution to Jake's unemployment woes.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Bye Bye Billy
programme.desc: Alison is terrified when she's accosted after a theater performance, and her decision to find safety in Keith's arms has Billy packing his bags.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Irreconcilable Similarities
programme.desc: As both of their relationships take the fast track to commitment and compromise, Alison and Billy both begin to wonder if they're making the right move.

programme.title: Melrose Place: End Game
programme.desc: Billy is shaken by the sudden death of his father but is even more surprised when both Amanda and Alison show up at the funeral.

programme.title: Melrose Place: The Test
programme.desc: It's a wicked game of "cat and mouse" when Alison begs Amanda for her old advertising job and Billy finds his padded resume gets him in more trouble than it's worth.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Pushing Boundaries
programme.desc: Things heat up at the workplace as Kimberly reveals to Michael that she wants to be more than just friends, and Billy finds himself doing too much "overtime" with his new boss, Nancy.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Pas de Trois
programme.desc: Money makes everything messy when Jo and Jake have a falling-out over taxes, Jane's new fashion assignment has her spending less and less time with Michael, and Amanda flaunts her higher position in the company.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Carpe Diem
programme.desc: It's a romantic evening to remember when Alison and Billy have their first "date" and Michael finds himself torn between two women on the night of their wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Melrose Place: State of Need
programme.desc: There are no easy answers when Amanda announces she's pregnant with Billy's child and Jane agrees to let Michael sleep on the couch if they go to couple's therapy.

programme.title: Melrose Place: Suspicious Minds
programme.desc: Melrose Place is for sale, and while Jane and Michael wonder if a new start might help their struggling relationship, Alison is afraid to leave her apartment after receiving threatening phone calls.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: You Bet Your Family
programme.desc: Salem’s gambling debts get the best of him, but its Sabrina and her aunts who pay the price.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: And The Sabrina Goes To
programme.desc: A spell to get her just desserts leaves Sabrina with egg on her face instead.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby
programme.desc: An out-of-control magic spaceship lands Sabrina and Salem inside Libby’s brain.
programme.sub-title: Nobody Nose * Libby Like Sabrina Knows * Libby

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Christmas Amnesia
programme.desc: It’s beginning to look a lot like Christmas until Sabrina accidentally erases the holiday

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina and The Beast
programme.desc: In order to teach Sabrina a lesson about love and beauty, Harvey is turned into a beast.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Whose So-Called Life is it Anyway?
programme.desc: Sabrina’s charitable magic turns out to be anything but a good deed.
programme.sub-title: Whose So-Called Life is it Anyway?

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Matchmaker
programme.desc: It’s Valentine’s Day, and Sabrina must help two people fall in love or suffer Cupid’s wrath.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: What Price Harvey?
programme.desc: Magical ambition shows its dark side when Harvey drops out of school to become an industrial tycoon.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina And The Pirates
programme.desc: Purchasing a fake ID in the Other Realm causes Sabrina’s magic to become fake as well.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Mrs. Kraft
programme.desc: Mr. Kraft’s ex-wife returns to win him back, but Zelda isn’t going to let him go without a fight.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Teenage Writer
programme.desc: When typed on a magical typewriter, Sabrina’s spy story and its characters come to life.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem The Boy
programme.desc: Salem's return to human form is short-lived, thanks to Roland the Troll and Sabrina's unknowing wishes.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Long and Winding Short Cut
programme.desc: Sabrina is stripped of modern conveniences after using shortcuts to solve her family secret.
programme.sub-title: The Long and Winding Short Cut

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina The Sandman
programme.desc: Employed as a Sandman, Sabrina gets into trouble dropping into other people’s dreams.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Pen Pal
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers her new pen pal witch is wanted in two realms.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)
programme.desc: Sabrina and her aunts travel to Hawaii for a family reunion, but when they arrive, Sabrina discovers that she will not be able to enjoy herself until she solves the family secret once and for all.
programme.sub-title: The Good The Bad And The Luau (Season Finale)

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Silent Movie
programme.desc: The Spellman house becomes the setting for a silent movie.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina’s Real World
programme.desc: Sabrina becomes the unknowing star of an Other Realm TV show.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Big Sleep
programme.desc: A vengeful aunt uses magic poppies to put the Spellman household to sleep.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Dream A Little Dreama Me
programme.desc: Her Witches License and a new student bring Sabrina a new set of challenges.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: No Place Like Home (Season Premiere)
programme.desc: Sabrina’s senior year of high school gets off to a rocky start.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem And Juliette
programme.desc: Sabrina helps Salem find a date for his high school reunion.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Jealousy
programme.desc: Jealousy gets the best of Sabrina when Harvey starts spending a lot of time with his best friend.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Prelude To A Kiss
programme.desc: Sabrina’s new coffeehouse co-worker poses a threat to her relationship with Harvey.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Phantom Menace
programme.desc: It’s Halloween, and Sabrina is having a ghoulish time adjusting to her new job at the coffee house.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Little Orphan Hilda
programme.desc: Hilda and Zelda experience a life-changing event when they discover they are adopted.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Spoiled Rotten
programme.desc: New charge card from the Other Realm causes Sabrina to forget that the most important things in life can’t be bought.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Aging Not So Gracefully
programme.desc: Sabrina goes a little overboard in her attempt to seem more mature for the attentions of a college boy.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry
programme.desc: Paying the price for kissing Josh, Sabrina must adjust to life after Harvey.
programme.sub-title: Love Means Having To Say You’re Sorry

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Ice Station Sabrina
programme.desc: A life-threatening situation forces Sabrina to risk exposing her magic to a witch hunter.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Sabrina Nipping At Your Nose
programme.desc: When the weather outside turns frightful, the Spellman’s plan a trip to Jamaica.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Now You See Her Now You Don’t
programme.desc: Adhering to a fad diet from the Other Realm, Sabrina becomes so thin she literally disappears.
programme.sub-title: Now You See Her Now You Don’t

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Super Hero
programme.desc: Childhood dreams come true when Sabrina casts a spell that turns Harvey into a superhero.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Salem’s Daughter
programme.desc: As maid of honor, Sabrina pays the price for reuniting Salem with his daughter in time for her wedding.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Love In Bloom
programme.desc: Valentine’s Day gets complicated when Sabrina learns two boys are vying for her heart.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: Welcome Back Duke
programme.desc: Sabrina discovers why the road to ruin is paved with good intentions.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: She’s Baaack!
programme.desc: Cousin Amanda returns to give Sabrina a little competition in the teenage witch -and love-- department.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Wild Wild Witch
programme.desc: The West gets even wilder when Sabrina takes the reins as town sheriff.

programme.title: Sabrina: The Teenage Witch: The Four Faces Of Sabrina
programme.desc: Choosing a college literally tears Sabrina apart when she tries too hard to make everyone happy.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans on the world's most challenging obstacle course; the new Kickboards obstacle makes its debut on the course which ends with the Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds continue in San Antonio where Minions have taken over the course and brought the new obstacle Despicaballs; other new obstacles include Shattered Panes and Final Frontier in addition to the iconic Warped Wall.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude in San Antonio with ninjas from across the country taking on the world's most challenging obstacle course; competitors as young as 15 take on seasoned veterans in this first round of competition from the Alamodome.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals begin in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including, for the first time, Kaleidoscope, Ghost Town and Spin Zone; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals continue in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including new obstacles Hopscotch and Box Office. The two fastest ninjas face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals continue in Los Angeles where competing ninjas will face up to 10 challenging obstacles, including new obstacles Over Under and Flipped Around; the two fastest ninjas will face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The semifinals conclude in Los Angeles where the competing ninjas face up to 10 challenging obstacles. The two fastest ninjas face off on the Power Tower for a Safety Pass going into the National Finals.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals return to Las Vegas where the ninjas face up to eight super-sized obstacles in Stage 1. The ninjas must complete the course, including new obstacles Three Ring Circus and Tetherball, to advance to Stage 2 of the national finals.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The finals continue in Las Vegas where the ninjas face super-sized obstacles in Stages 1 and 2 in timed runs; the ninjas who advance to Stage 2 must complete a six-obstacle course, including new obstacle Hornet's Nest, to advance to Stage 3.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The national finals conclude in Las Vegas as the remaining competitors move on to stages 3 and 4 for their chance to win $1 million and become the next American Ninja Warrior.

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK
programme.desc: Ben Shephard, Rochelle Humes and Chris Kamara host the series of the assault course game show.

programme.title: Ninja Warrior UK
programme.desc: Ben Shephard, Rochelle Humes and Chris Kamara host as competitors from all over the UK take on this assault course in one of TV's toughest challenges.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo and Wolf must keep their cool among the Deathstalkers, as the chase continues for the old burrow; Scarlemagne makes a whopping discovery.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo and the gang look for answers in her parents' former quarters; mysterious forces gather.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The chums frolic with Fun Gus until a slippery helper arrives. It is time to throw Kipo an anchor as the Mega Monkey moves on.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The Mega Jaguar rages out of control in fury, but Benson knows how to deal with the rowdy Mutes. The question concerns whether or not the gang can trust Doctor Emilia and Kipo, himself.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: A tyrant tells his tale; Wolf, Benson and Dave hatch a plan that could blow up in their faces.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The day of the big coronation has finally arrived. Kipo and team have come to learn that the enemy they thought they were fighting is only half as bad as the real enemy, Dr Emilia.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: An epic battle takes place in the palace between Team Kipo, Scarlemagne, Dr Emilia, and the Mega Monkey. Kipo makes one last desperate plea to Scarlemagne, but he just will not listen.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The hunt is on for Dr. Emilia, and friends start to disappear; it will take teamwork to make Kipo's dream of a Human Mute Ultimate Friendship Alliance work.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Dr. Emilia is kidnapping her way to a cure; Kipo and her pals must keep their cool as they stake out the doctor's hideout.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Frenemies return; Kipo reaches out to Scarlemagne, while Margot asks Wolf for a favour.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: With Wolf, Benson and Dave in danger, Kipo must use her brain to outsmart Dr. Emilia; a Mega gets a helping hand from Scarlemagne.
programme.sub-title: Don't You Forget a Meow Me

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: A "cured" friend returns; a dream family reunion becomes a reality; the race for a vaccine begins after a frolic with the Dubstep Bees.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Dr. Emilia and her army work through the death ivy, while the alliance crafts cunning traps.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: As everyone regroups, Kipo blames herself for the damage done; Dave arrives with a tale about fanatics.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo hopes that Prahm will end the war with killer banjo and dance, but she must convince the Mutes to forgive.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Dr. Emilia's determination runs deep and grows darker; Scarlemagne and Wolf set out to end her, and Song reveals a secret.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Everyone must work together to stop Dr. Emilia, as a Mega Mute battle shuts down a successful bash; now is the time for real heroes.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Swept from her safe burrow, Kipo emerges in a wild surface world full of weird mutant animals. Her new friends Wolf and Mandu must help her get home.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Benson gets a jump on the Mod Frogs to save Kipo, Wolf and his buddy, Dave. However, it will take a hopping mad Mega Bunny to get them out of another jam.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Held captive by the brawling Timbercats, Kipo and her pals must find their leader, Yumyan Hammerpaw, to avoid becoming cat food.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Leading an army of allies, Kipo argues with Wolf about the best way to avoid a hissy fit on Umlaut Snake turf.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo and the gang cosy up to the nerdy Newton Wolves and use their telescope to find the burrow people.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The wolves break the news to Scarlemagne as Kipo tries to crack her father's code. Benson gives the burrow girl a birthday surprise or two.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: The friends stumble upon tardigrade dream-maker Tad Mulholland who allows the gang to find their bliss. However, it comes at a price.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Scarlemagne rallies his troops as Kipo searches for her next clue, which sends her into a trash canyon and into a hideaway for Fitness Raccoons.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: A big secret's out, and Wolf can't deal. Kipo must resist the urge to pet Mega Bunny babies before escaping from sticky Mod Frog Jamack.

programme.desc: It's a high-jumping, thirsty Mega Flea vs. the Mega Dogs as Kipo closes in on the burrow, but disaster may have followed her home.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.desc: Kipo has to go through an old friend before flying off to find Scarlemagne and save her father; it is time learn Timbercat survival skills.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo takes great joy in discovering the fanciful world around him, going on journeys to fantastic places and fostering imagination, curiosity and exploration. with a rotating cast of friends.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns all about baths, including how different animals get clean, and tries to count bubbles in a bubble bath. Mr Noodle tries to get into a bathtub.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about how different kinds of bells are used for different purposes, while Mr Noodle has trouble figuring out how to use a bell.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo and friends learn about dinosaurs, so Mr Noodle acts like a dinosaur, and Elmo counts how many baby dinosaurs hatch from dinosaur eggs.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about all the fun things you can do with your feet, and Mr Noodle has trouble learning how to hop.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Mr Noodle has trouble trying to ride a seesaw, and Elmo counts how many times a hippo can go up and down on a pogo stick.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo and his friends find out about cats, Mr Noodle gets chased by Barkley when he pretends to be a cat and a look at the similarities between different types of cats.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about different kinds of cameras and how to take a picture. Mr Noodle tries to take a picture of a talking cheese, and Elmo counts the pictures in his photo album.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about jumping and counts some jumping beans while Mr Noodle tries to figure out how to jump over a hurdle.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns that there are different kinds of schools, and Mr Noodle tries to ask a question by raising his eyebrows.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about skin and finds out what it looks like through a magnifying glass while Mr Noodle gets dizzy trying to scratch his back.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about how we use water, and how to swim.

programme.desc: Elmo learns about how different kinds of bells are used for different purposes, while Mr Noodle has trouble figuring out how to use a bell.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo and friends learn about dinosaurs, so Mr Noodle acts like a dinosaur, and Elmo counts how many baby dinosaurs hatch from dinosaur eggs.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about all the fun things you can do with your feet, and Mr Noodle has trouble learning how to hop.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Mr Noodle has trouble trying to ride a seesaw, and Elmo counts how many times a hippo can go up and down on a pogo stick.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo and his friends find out about cats, Mr Noodle gets chased by Barkley when he pretends to be a cat and a look at the similarities between different types of cats.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about different kinds of cameras and how to take a picture. Mr Noodle tries to take a picture of a talking cheese, and Elmo counts the pictures in his photo album.

programme.title: Elmo's World
programme.desc: Elmo learns about jumping and counts some jumping beans while Mr Noodle tries to figure out how to jump over a hurdle.

programme.desc: Elmo learns that there are different kinds of schools, and Mr Noodle tries to ask a question by raising his eyebrows.

programme.desc: Elmo learns about skin and finds out what it looks like through a magnifying glass while Mr Noodle gets dizzy trying to scratch his back.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas has to take the new track inspection vehicle out on all his jobs today.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: A photograph of the engines is to be taken for a big billboard, but all hell breaks loose when Diesel accidentally rolls in front of the camera and obscures Thomas.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Edward is chosen to deliver a new brass water wheel to the water works. However, there is trouble ahead when the proud engine decides to take the scenic route in order to show his friends his valuable load.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: It is carnival time on Sodor and Rosie is hoping to pull the special coaches, but when the job is given to Emily, Rosie decides to show her worth by attempting to shift the funfair herself.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Miss Marvel shares her tale of Proteus the mystical engine.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When the Sodor Wishing Tree is damaged in a storm, Henry makes every effort to prevent some woodsmen from reaching it and chopping it down. However, little does he know that the woodsmen have actually come to repair the tree.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When a big, brash engine called Hank offers to help Thomas with his chores, the little engine shrugs off his assistance, but Thomas comes to regret being so hasty when he cracks a cylinder and needs some help.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Toby is determined to find something special on the island in order to impress Sir Topham Hatt, but after searching all over Sodor without success, he runs out of coal and must call for help.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Emily gets too big for her boots after some praise from the Fat Controller.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Freddie decides to organise a winter party at the wharf instead of at Mr Percival's house so that Colin the Crane can join in. However, the forgetful engine neglects to tell Mr Percival and all of the equipment is loaded onto a barge.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When a Sodor fireman is to be presented with a medal for bravery, Thomas decides to be a hero too. He tries to prove himself but causes havoc and disaster wherever he goes. Can he make amends?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Duncan feels hurt when, instead of a train ride, Mr Percival decides to take the twins for a birthday trip in a hot-air balloon.
programme.sub-title: Duncan and the Hot Air Balloon

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: James ignores Hector the truck's advice and sets off in the middle of some bad winter weather. When he gets stuck in a snow drift, James soon wishes he had listened to Hector.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Toby is given the job of leading the parade at the first Great Waterton festival with a new tram called Flora.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Diesel challenges Thomas to a race backwards all around Sodor. Unable to see where they are going, the two engines cause chaos everywhere.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Gordon is a very proud engine and thinks he knows the railway better than anyone else. When he takes a shortcut to the docks, he gets lost and refuses to ask for directions.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: It is Mr Percival's birthday and Sir Handel is going to tell the story of the `Man in the Hills'. While picking up a load of presents, Thomas finds a mysterious shape in the side of a hill and decides to reorganise Mr Percival's party.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas has been given the job of delivering specially made blocks for the Sodor River Bridge, but things go awry when his brakes begin to fail.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Percy is charged with taking Lady Hatt to her surprise party at the new bandstand. However, little realising the purpose of her journey, Lady Hatt instructs the engine to take her elsewhere.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The puppet show has arrived on Sodor and Skarloey is determined to pull the special train. However, his refusal to accept help with the heavy trucks causes chaos across the railway.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas and Percy have a falling out when the former decides to keep a secret from his pal.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: It is the day of the spring party at the Duke and Duchess of Boxford's summer house. As the engines make the necessary preparations, Cranky teases Thomas, saying he can only carry light loads.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is given the job of transporting a very special statue. However, he thinks his cargo is a real lion and attempts to feed it all kinds of food.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Whilst covered in a pink undercoat, James is asked to pick up the Fat Controller's granddaughter, but the proud engine is worried that his friends will tease him.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is sent to pick up the Fat Controller to take him to a birthday party. However, when he arrives at the station, the Fat Controller seems to have been replaced by a mischievous impostor.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas discovers he has something of a skill for comedy when an assignment to collect a cargo of bubbles goes awry.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: While Percy is at the steam works being repaired, Thomas is excited to be given the job of doing the mail run for him. Gordon advises the cheeky engine to seek Percy's advice, but Thomas thinks he knows it all.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When famous opera singer Alicia Botti arrives, Thomas is bubbling with pride as he is sent to take her to a grand concert. New engine Charlie also makes his debut, will he turn out to be even more fun than Thomas?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Farmer Trotter asks Thomas to collect some straw for the piglets, which are soon to be born. On the way, Thomas sees other things he thinks the piglets will like.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The Fat Controller announces that the library is holding a story time for the children and that he needs an engine to deliver the storybooks.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Percy is asked to deliver Dowager Hatt's birthday present from the Fat Controller. Percy is so proud that he shows off his gift crate to Mavis - but at the quarry it gets covered in slate dust.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Toby is fitted with a brand new three-chime whistle while his little bell is repaired. He finds his new device a bit daunting, and so comes up with a plan.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When Mavis does not say hello, Emily assumes she is sad and chuffs to the quarry to cheer her up with some of the new flowers - but disaster strikes.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When Mavis does not say hello, Emily assumes she is sad and chuffs to the quarry to cheer her up with some of the new flowers - but disaster strikes.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The engines are preparing for the Sodor kite gala. Meanwhile, the Fat Controller's grandchildren are up on Gordon's Hill with their multicoloured kite.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Victor has to leave the steam works, with Thomas taking over for the day. Victor tries to tell Thomas how to run the works in his absence, but Thomas doesn't listen.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: It's a rainy day on Sodor, with big puddles everywhere. Thomas decides to have a game of splashing puddles with Rosie. It is so much fun that he forgets to pick up the Fat Controller and Alicia Botti.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Hiro returns to the island. The Fat Controller tells Thomas and Percy that he is organising a welcome party at Knapford, but Thomas forgets to tell the other engines.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Gordon decides he is the strongest engine. Ignoring the advice of the Fat Controller not to climb any steep hills in the snow, Gordon crashes into some trucks and derails.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Henry wants to do something helpful, but instead he lets a herd of pigs get dirty in a field and frightens away the Sodor Warbler! Can Henry redeem himself?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is excited when he is asked to deliver the new beehives to Farmer Trotter. However, when he takes a route by a flowery field, the bees buzz away and refuse to come back.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: When Hiro sees that the Fat Controller is very busy, he decides to help out by making some decisions for him, but is Hiro being as helpful as he thinks he is?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: All kinds of shenanigans ensue when Thomas is called upon to deliver a giraffe to the Sodor Wildlife Centre.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: All of the engines are in a state of excitement as the winter holidays arrive. Most excited of all is Henry, who must deliver a special box to a field. Henry wonders what the package contains.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: James refuses to be fitted with a lamp to help him see in the dark; he regrets his decision when he picks up the wrong person.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: On the day of a special Sodor football tournament, all the engines are given important jobs - except Emily, who is tasked with picking up some dirty washing.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Edward tries to show his friend Charlie that he is a really fun engine, to the detriment of his job; deciding to be called Eddie, Edward spends the day larking around, but things go somewhat awry.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Toby must visit the summerhouse, which means travelling through the scary Whistling Woods. The little engine is determined to get through the woods without being frightened, until all kinds of noises send him steaming off in the opposite direction.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Whilst chuffing down the line, Henry collides with a truck and cracks his right siderod. Hiro pushes him to the Steamworks where Victor tells Henry all about health and safety. Henry takes the message to heart, and causes chaos.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Diesel swaps his dull load of slate for a haul of shiny red apples in order to please Sodor's school children.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is amused by the popping sounds coming from his fizzy load of lemonade, but when he delivers the cargo to a children's party, he discovers that the bottles are empty because of his antics. Can Thomas save the day?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Victor bites off more than he can chew when he agrees to fix almost every engine in Sodor on the same day. Will Victor learn that it is okay to say no sometimes?

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: The Island Inspector pays a visit to Sodor, but Thomas's ambitious plans to impress him lead to chaos - and flying coal trucks.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Percy decides to imitate wise old Gordon in order to win the respect of the other engines. However, Percy's plan backfires when his new project means that he forgets to deliver his mail.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is given the very important job of delivering the Star of Knapford. Instead of going directly to Knapford station, he decides to grant all his friends a wish upon the star.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is anxious to help the children find some hats for their snowmen, so he decides to borrow some from the people of Sodor without asking permission first.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas tries to be in two places at once. The Fat Controller enlists Thomas to teach the silly Misty Island Logging Locos, but he has already promised to play a game of hide-and-seek with Percy.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is ordered to collect some precious Jobi wood from Misty Island. Chaos ensues when naughty crane Old Wheezy starts throwing the logs everywhere.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas decides that it is high time new engine Scruff took a bath. However, when the grubby newcomer gets wind of Thomas's plan, he flees in terror.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Gordon is put in charge of Whiff's Waste Dump for the day, deciding to hide whenever one of his friends appears at the dump. As a result, the waste begins to pile up and Gordon's domain gets smellier and smellier.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Thomas is given the job of escorting the Fat Controller's mother, Dowager Hatt, on a tour of Sodor. However, she is less than impressed by her guide's choice of important sights.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Dash, Bash and Ferdinand decide to throw a Christmas party. Before long, the logging locos have caused chaos on Misty Island and it is down to Thomas to save the day.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Under the Flag of Freedom!
programme.desc: After being invited to be a pirate by Harlock, Tadashi exits the Arcadia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: To the Shores of Distant Star
programme.desc: Harlock tells Tadashi, upon joining his crew, to just loiter around and enjoy it, leaving Tadashi confused.
programme.sub-title: To the Shores of Distant Star

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Phantom Mazone
programme.desc: The Mazone soldier mentioned the name Queen Lafresia as she blew herself up.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Pyramid On the Ocean Floor
programme.desc: Upon seeing an odd looking formation from space, Harlock's crew heads to the Bermuda area.
programme.sub-title: The Pyramid On the Ocean Floor

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Queens Space Fleet
programme.desc: There are signals being emitted from the pennant and the pyramid.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Fearsome Plant Life Form
programme.desc: Dr. Zero analyzes the hair from the captured Mazone and sees their make-up is identical to sap found in plant life.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Advance On the Mystery Planet
programme.desc: Believing that all the jungles of Earth are inhabited by the Mazone, Harlock decides to return to the Pirate Island.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: When Lola Shines Golden
programme.desc: The Arcadia successfully makes its way to Venus.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Mother, Be Eternal
programme.desc: Tadashi is upset at himself for talking about the Arcadia to Lola.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Castle of Evil in the Sea of Death
programme.desc: The Arcadia heads back to Earth to investigate a third signal being emitted from the Sargasso Sea.
programme.sub-title: The Castle of Evil in the Sea of Death

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Mausoleum of the Sphinx
programme.desc: Commander Kiruta takes Mayu with him. Desperate to find her, Harlock receives a message from Commander Kiruta.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Tragic Love! the Northern Pole Aurora
programme.desc: The Arcadia is at the north pole after spotting an aurora that closely resembles a runway.
programme.sub-title: Tragic Love! the Northern Pole Aurora

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Kei - A Farewell Song
programme.desc: The operator, Kei Yuki, goes to visit her parents' grave.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Skeleton Hero
programme.desc: Upon finding a message in a bottle floating in space that contains an SOS message from Captain Yamanaka of the Braves.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Evil Shadow Soldiers
programme.desc: A group of Mazone suddenly appear in the ship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Queen Lafresias Trap
programme.desc: There are supposed to be forty-two crewman aboard the Arcadia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Extinct Planet Jura
programme.desc: Miime's old planet is named Jura, and it was once devastated by a nuclear attack.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Gohrum! the Tragic Soldier
programme.desc: An asteroid belt hits the Arcadia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Space Graveyard: Deathshadow
programme.desc: Upon returning to Deathshadow Island with the memory device left behind by Zol, Harlock and his crew learn something huge about Queen Lafresia's flagship.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Yattaran, Song of a Plastic Model Fanatic
programme.desc: Upon victory, Harlock orders First mate Yattaran to secure the hostages.
programme.sub-title: Yattaran, Song of a Plastic Model Fanatic

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Shooting Star of Pure Love
programme.desc: A surprising couple, Zorba, the son of the warrior Zol, and a Mazone medic named Lucia, escaped from the Mazone fleet.
programme.sub-title: The Shooting Star of Pure Love

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Dr. Zero and Mii
programme.desc: Doctor Zero becomes extremely resentful over Zorba and Lucia's murder.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Long Way Away Voyage
programme.desc: Due to Harlock's unrelenting resistance, there is a growing resentment between the Mazone military and its civilians.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Will of the Arcadia
programme.desc: Having a hunch as to the reason why Harlock so staunchly opposes them, Queen Lafresia sends someone on a mission to Earth to find out why.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Ulysses Nebula
programme.desc: In order to rescue Mayu, Harlock allows the will of the ship to choose its own course.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Life-and-Death Struggle On the Rainbow Planet
programme.desc: The Mazone come attacking the Arcadia which has had too much free time lately.
programme.sub-title: The Life-and-Death Struggle On the Rainbow Planet

programme.title: Captain Harlock: My Friend, My Youth

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Arcadia: The Secret Story of Its Construction

programme.sub-title: Arcadia: The Secret Story of Its Construction

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Call of the Star Flute
programme.desc: The Mazone plot to use Mayu to lure Harlock and the Arcadia to the Wind Planet and then attack with a powerful mine.
programme.sub-title: The Call of the Star Flute

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Lone Man's Charge
programme.desc: Commander Kiruta learns of the existence of the Mazone and persistently tries to inform the Prime Minister of the impending doom.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: A Galactic Lullaby
programme.desc: The Arcadia is trapped due to an artificial gravity device.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Beautiful Mysterious Woman
programme.desc: After rescuing Mayu, all that remains is the final showdown with Lafresia.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: The Eve of the Showdown
programme.desc: The beautiful, dazzling Shizuka Namino becomes a bit of a celebrity on board the Arcadia after being rescued.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Tears On a Red Sweater
programme.desc: Upon realizing that Harlock knew who Shizuka's real identity is, she deems that she has failed in her mission.

programme.title: Captain Harlock: Farewell! Mayu
programme.desc: The invasion Mazone forces finally begin their attack on Earth.
