programme.title: The Ape Man
programme.desc: A crazed scientist accidentally turns himself into a half ape, half human creature, and scrambles to find a cure.

programme.title: Nosferatu
programme.desc: Vampire Count Orlok expresses interest in a new residence and real estate agent Hutter's wife.

programme.title: The Pack
programme.desc: A farmer and his family must fight for survival after a ferocious pack of wild dogs infiltrates their isolated farmhouse. Through a series of frightening and bloody encounters they are forced into survival mode to make it through the night.

programme.title: The Vampire's Night Orgy
programme.desc: Stranded travelers seek refuge in a remote village, only to discover it's inhabited by vampires with sinister intentions.

programme.title: Book of Monsters
programme.desc: In the vein of EVIL DEAD, an 18th birthday becomes a bloodbath when monsters descend upon a house party!

programme.title: The Day of the Triffids
programme.desc: After an unusual meteor shower leaves most of the human population blind, a merchant navy officer must find a way to conquer tall, aggressive plants which are feeding on people and animals. Starring: Howard Keel, Nicole Maurey, Janette Scott

programme.title: Underworld: Legend of the Jinn
programme.desc: Shawn discovers there is far more to his world when he receives a cryptic message warning him of a curse that has afflicted his family for generations. Shawn then discovers revelations that set him on a collision course with the unknown.

programme.title: Attack of the Killer Tomatoes
programme.desc: A group of scientists band together to save the world from mutated tomatoes that KILL! (1978)

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Under My Spell
programme.desc: A new family has moved to Wolverton, and they use their mysterious powers to turn the townspeople into zombies. The only people able to withstand their powers are the Howards.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Punks Out
programme.desc: Scott, Stiles, and Boof head downtown to celebrate Scott's winning touchdown, and Grandma gives him a special potion that will keep him from turning into a werewolf for the night.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: The Curse
programme.desc: Grandma's long time foe, Zazu, places a curse on the family, which turns anyone the Howards touch into a werewolf. Zazu agrees to lift the curse if Scott can give her an old photograph of her and his grandparents.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: It's No Picnic Being Teen Wolf
programme.desc: Scott has to watch over Grandpa for the weekend while Grandma is out of town, but it's the same weekend as the school picnic. Grandpa tags along with Scott and his friends, leaving Scott embarrassed.
programme.sub-title: It's No Picnic Being Teen Wolf

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Toot Toot, Tut Tut and All That Rot
programme.desc: The werewolf mascot costume is stolen by the uppity Upson High boys, right before the big game. Scott and Stiles must outsmart the snobbish Upson boys in order to retrieve the costume, or they'll have to find a new mascot entirely.
programme.sub-title: Toot Toot, Tut Tut and All That Rot

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Down on the Farm
programme.desc: Scott and his family volunteer on a farm for a week, but it proves to be a lot more work than they've expected. The animals sense that the Howards are werewolves and flee, leaving the Howards responsible for finding them before the farmer's return.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Diary of a Mad Werewolf
programme.desc: The town statue is stolen by a couple of crooks who ask for ransom money. The Howards learn that the inside of the statue contains the diary of their distant werewolf relative, and grow concerned that the diary could get into the wrong hands.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Teen Wolf, Come Home
programme.desc: In an adjacent town, Scott picks up a flamingo sink for his dad's customer. While leaving the shop, he falls down a man hole and loses his memory. Scott explores all over the town in order to remember his identity, and his family goes searching for him.

programme.title: Teen Wolf: Scott and the Howlers
programme.desc: After Scott and his rock band perform a song on a televised talent show, Scott is discovered by a record label that wants to sign him.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E6 - Natural Election
programme.desc: Crichton correctly predicts a wormhole's appearance near Moya, but simultaneously a giant space plant captures the Leviathan.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E7 - John Quixote
programme.desc: Crichton and Chiana get stuck in a video game where they encounter strange/twisted versions of their friends.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E8 - I Shrink Therefore I Am
programme.desc: When Moya is raided by bounty hunters working for the Peacekeepers, every crew member is captured except for Crichton and Noranti.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E8 - I Shrink Therefore I Am

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E9 - A Prefect Murder
programme.desc: While Moya and her crew are resupplying on a generally xenophobic planet, Aeryn kills the next prefect while under a strange form of suggestion.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E9 - A Prefect Murder

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E10 - Coup By Clam
programme.desc: The crew consume food, sharing amongst themselves. Although if not ingested by the same person, it becomes toxic.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E10 - Coup By Clam

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E11 - Unrealized Reality
programme.desc: Crichton falls into a wormhole and meets up with a strange man who shows Crichton the consequences of wormhole travel.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E12 - Kansas
programme.desc: After accidentally returning to Earth, Crichton discovers he is in 1985 and he has altered the timeline.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E13 - Terra Firma
programme.desc: Crichton has arrived on Earth. Even though the Moya crew relaxes on Earth and are treated as VIPs, Crichton can't seem to adjust to life on Earth.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E14 - Twice Shy
programme.desc: Moya takes on a new passenger, Talikaa. However, Talikaa turns out to be an alien in disguise and is intent on harvesting the crew's neural energy.

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E15 - Mental As Anything
programme.desc: The males of the crew undergo some training. Crichton learns how to resist Scarran probes. While D'Argo learns some self-control.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E15 - Mental As Anything

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E16 - Bringing Home The Beacon
programme.desc: The women of Moya travel to a dead Leviathan to buy a sensor beacon for Moya which will allow her to appear to be a different ship.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E16 - Bringing Home The Beacon

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E17 - A Constellation Of Doubt
programme.desc: John Crichton struggles to learn the location of the mysterious Katratzi, whilst watching a television documentary about himself and the aliens.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E17 - A Constellation Of Doubt

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E18 - Prayer
programme.desc: Crichton and Scorpius travel to one of the 'unrealized realities' where Crichton believes he heard Stark say 'Katratzi.'

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E19 - We're So Screwed, Part 1: Fetal Attraction
programme.desc: The crew goes after Aeryn on a Scarran controlled station.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E19 - We're So Screwed, Part 1: Fetal Attraction

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E20 - We're So Screwed, Part 2: Hot To Katratzi
programme.desc: Moya arrives at Katratzi. Crichton attends the peace talks between the Scarrans and the Peacekeepers with a nuclear bomb.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E20 - We're So Screwed, Part 2: Hot To Katratzi

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba
programme.desc: Scorpius has betrayed the crew. Now they're all captured. Their plan failed, the crew has little choice but to help Scorpius's true agenda.
programme.sub-title: Farscape: S4 E21 - We're So Screwed, Part 3: La Bomba

programme.title: Farscape: Farscape: S4 E22 - Bad Timing
programme.desc: With their Crystherium stores low, the Scarrans must travel to Earth through a wormhole as those flowers grow there.

programme.title: Farscape: The Peacekeeper Wars
programme.desc: John Crichton and Aeryn anticipate the birth of their child, only to get caught in the middle of a war that threatens millions of lives.
